LanguageData.VQE_DroneCore.label: drone core
LanguageData.VQE_DroneCore.description: A dense, self-contained fusion of computation and power storage, designed to serve as the central processing unit for a drone. It houses the drone's core logic, operational parameters, and a hidden library of factory-loaded schematics.\n\nDecrypting the core's data logs at a research bench can unlock schematics for a new type of drone, allowing its construction.
